body:
Hey all, it’s been another weird day, not bad, just odd. I know I haven’t been around much. Work kept me pretty busy lately and things have been off with my nesting partner’s dad in the hospital, so they’ve been home less, which is throwing routines off and thus using extra spoons. 😞 I’m gonna try and continue to give my random morning updates and some fic most days.

And I still plan to show off. 😘 But the pics will happen when they happen, with life lifing right now, lol. And I’ll try to mention when I post them in my morning updates, since I don’t tag or allow reblogs on them. (Just a special treat for followers or folks reading my page directly. 🖤)

I hope everyone had a wonderful day. 🖤 And rest well when you head that way! 🖤
